hero.sub: LiDAR + AI + PostGIS — one unified system for every talent in Poland. From grassroots to the national team, in real time.

personas.subtitle: Different audiences have different questions. Click to jump to the right part.

technology.title: Technology
technology.subtitle: LiDAR, biomechanics, machine learning and system architecture — full technical documentation of the #Polska2038 platform.

talentMap.title: Talent map
talentMap.subtitle: Interactive map of 16 regions with talent data. Filter by region, sport, age and AI tier. Scout card demo with a full player profile.

forWho.title: Who it's for
forWho.subtitle: #Polska2038 serves every stakeholder in Polish sport — from parents and kids to the Ministry, federations and academies. Pick your use case.

results.title: Results
results.subtitle: KPI metrics, projections to 2038, Poland vs Europe benchmarks, the talent funnel and an interactive ROI calculator.

partners.title: Partners
partners.subtitle: Federations, sponsors, media and ambassadors of the #Polska2038 program — including the FA, UEFA, the Ministry and leading Polish sports outlets.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: A new approach to talent identification. A system based on 3D scanning, biomechanics and data — a civic initiative presented to the Ministry and the FA.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with the program architecture team. Partnerships, pilots and national rollout discussions.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: All #Polska2038 materials — ready for printing, distribution and presentations to the Ministry, the FA and the media.

footer.tagline: National Operating System for Polish sport.
footer.tagline2: LiDAR + AI + PostGIS. No talent slips through.

landing.heroTagline: Citizen initiative · For the Ministry of Sport · 2026–2038

finalCta.body: Reach the program team about partnerships and pilots.

countdown.pilotFoot: 3 regions · 50 Orlik pitches · 500 coaches in the system
countdown.finalFoot: Window 2026–2030 · Cohorts 2010–2016 · 12 years to build champions

1.title: POLAND 2038
1.subtitle: Building champions — a training system for 1,000 top talents per year
1.goal: World Cup 2038 final + Ekstraklasa in UEFA top 5 by 2035

2.title: SAFE STADIUM
2.subtitle: Building fans — family zones and zero tolerance for violence

3.title: COACH EVALUATION
3.subtitle: Building quality — independent audits and removal of underperformers
3.goal: 100% of public-system coaches evaluated by 2028 + transparent rankings
3.warning: ⚠️ The most important pillar — without it the whole project collapses. Without good coaches, PLN 1B/year from pillar 1 is wasted.

docsPage.heroLeadBefore: All materials are free to use in publications with attribution

docsPage.mediaFoot: The project may be used, adapted or implemented by the Ministry, the FA, clubs or any institution without contacting the authors.
